channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Should you wait for the Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8?
item.description: Leaks and rumors are pointing to another exciting year for Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold series, and the Z Fold 8 may just change things up in one of the biggest ways yet.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

media:content.media:description: Holding the blue Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 while it's tented
media:content.media:text: Holding the blue Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 while it's tented
media:content.media:title: Holding the blue Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 7 while it's tented

item.title: Leak says OPPO has a 'Wide' foldable in the works, too, but you might have to wait
item.description: Rumors bring Oppo into the "wide foldable" game, stating it's already working on its own take.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: OPPO Find N6 review on Android Central
media:content.media:text: OPPO Find N6 review on Android Central
media:content.media:title: OPPO Find N6 review on Android Central

item.title: Run it back: a budget Nothing Ear 3a are all these rumors can talk about
item.description: Nothing is supposedly working on another pair of budget earbuds: the Ear 3a, as prices reportedly leak.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: First look at Nothing Ear 3 wireless earbuds
media:content.media:text: First look at Nothing Ear 3 wireless earbuds
media:content.media:title: First look at Nothing Ear 3 wireless earbuds

item.title: Keeping it fun: Nothing debuts its phones, audio lineup at Best Buy in the US
item.description: Nothing says tech can be fun, debuts its phones and audio series at Best Buy across hundreds of U.S. Best Buy stores.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Glyph Matrix on the back of the Nothing Phone 4a Pro showing an always-on clock
media:content.media:text: The Glyph Matrix on the back of the Nothing Phone 4a Pro showing an always-on clock
media:content.media:title: The Glyph Matrix on the back of the Nothing Phone 4a Pro showing an always-on clock

item.title: Murena's /e/OS 4 update frees you from Google with as little as 'one tap'
item.description: Murena takes a bold step forward with its privacy-focused software for users, making it easier than ever to get away from Google.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Fairphone (Gen 6)
media:content.media:text: Fairphone (Gen 6)

item.title: Prime Day Garmin watch deals have landed — score up to 50% off Fenix, Venu, Forerunner, and more
item.description: Prime Day is still over a week away, but Amazon is already dropping smartwatch deals like there's no tomorrow.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Garmin Venu 4 and Venu 3

item.title: 5 ways the Razr Fold 2027 can improve on Motorola's already-excellent foldable
item.description: I'm still very much in the honeymoon phase with the Motorola Razr Fold, but it's never too early to start thinking about the sequel. Here's my wishlist for the Razr Fold 2027.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Fold open and on a corner
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Fold open and on a corner
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Fold open and on a corner

item.title: Galaxy phones are finally getting a feature Android users have wanted for years
item.description: One UI 9 finally gives Galaxy phones a built-in network speed meter, but Samsung tucked this long-requested feature away inside Good Lock.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra testing on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra testing on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra testing on Android Central

item.title: Escaping the loop? Google speaks up about that huge Pixel booting problem
item.description: Pixels have been suffering from a frustrating bootloop issue, and Google has reportedly spoken up about it, offering a (hopeful) solution.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central
media:content.media:text: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central
media:content.media:title: Google Pixel 10 Pro XL photos on Android Central

item.title: Summer is around the corner, and this new Motorola Razr feature can help you take better vacation photos
item.description: This Motorola Razr feature takes out a lot of the guesswork and conducting when you're trying to get someone to take a decent photo of you.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Motorola Razr Fold cameras
media:content.media:text: Motorola Razr Fold cameras
media:content.media:title: Motorola Razr Fold cameras

item.title: Synology DiskStation DS225+ long-term review: This 2.5GbE NAS is finally a good upgrade
item.description: The DiskStation DS225+ has a solitary upgrade over the DS224+: you get 2.5GbE connectivity. That alone is enough to give it an edge, and you still get class-leading software and a great all-round 2-bay NAS server.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Synology DiskStation DS225+ NAS review and testing
media:content.media:text: Synology DiskStation DS225+ NAS review and testing
media:content.media:title: Synology DiskStation DS225+ NAS review and testing

item.title: This Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 battery leak has me more excited than any new AI feature
item.description: The Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 could finally bring the battery boost Wear OS users have wanted for years, with leaks pointing to more than three days of runtime.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra (2025) on wrist hands-on
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra (2025) on wrist hands-on
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy Watch Ultra (2025) on wrist hands-on

item.title: Nobody understands smartphone design like Motorola, and I'm totally surprised by how good the Motorola Edge 2026 is
item.description: The Motorola Edge 2026 might have the best year-over-year improvement of any smartphone released in 2026, making it a great choice for mid-range buyers.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Sutrich

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 vs. Galaxy Watch 8: Should you play the waiting game?
item.description: The Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 should arrive in July 2026 but that's still a wait of a few months. Meanwhile, the Watch 8 can be bought right away and should offer nearly the same experience.

item.title: DLSS for Android? I got an early look at Arm's neural graphics tech, and I'm excited
item.description: Arm just showcased Neural Dawn, a game built with its AI-assisted neural rendering techniques and dynamic lighting. I got an early look at the game, and I'm excited by its potential.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:title: TeamGroup PD20M MagSafe SSD design photos against a craft sheet

item.title: This hidden Gmail trick gives you virtually unlimited email IDs
item.description: Gmail ignores dots in an email, so you have a virtually infinite variation of Gmail IDs you can give out — all without having to create a new email account. Gmail aliases are particularly handy if you need to access a deal that's only limited to new users.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: The Gmail logo on a Pixel 6 Pro

media:content.media:title: The Gmail logo on a Pixel 6 Pro

item.title: UGREEN DXP4800 GT review: This 4-bay 10GbE NAS is built for enthusiasts
item.description: The DXP4800 GT is the latest addition to UGREEN's 4-bay NASync portfolio, and with two 10GbE ports and other extras, it is the ideal creator-focused mid-range NAS.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: UGREEN DXP4800 GT 4-bay NAS on an IKEA shelf showcasing the design at the front
media:content.media:text: UGREEN DXP4800 GT 4-bay NAS on an IKEA shelf showcasing the design at the front
media:content.media:title: UGREEN DXP4800 GT 4-bay NAS on an IKEA shelf showcasing the design at the front
